TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_alukul, title = alukul, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/alukul} }

S.FORM: = alukul = u alukul ku sapisanga' tu epah. u zuma a kamu: nu Hulam:ťÖíÁ≤ĺ,šĻôťÜá nu Amilika:ethanol,alcohol nu Lipun:„ā®„āŅ„Éé„Éľ„Éę
S.PHON: = ar~…ĺukur~…ĺ = u ar~…ĺukur~…ĺ ku sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu …ôpańß. u zuma a kamu: nu ńßur~…ĺam:**,** nu amir~…ĺika:…ôtńßanor~…ĺ,ar~…ĺ ¶ońßor~…ĺ nu r~…ĺipun:*****
